example: She struggled to control the unwieldy shopping cart as it veered in different directions.
After the workout, she lifted a hefty dumbbell to strengthen her arm muscles.
Carrying the cumbersome boxes up the stairs was exhausting.
The unyielding steel structure of the bridge withstood the powerful forces of the storm, remaining intact.
The newborn giraffe took its first wobbly steps, getting used to the long legs that would soon carry it with grace.
The spider's web was so tenuous that even the slightest breeze could break it.
The backpacker invested in a rugged tent, ensuring it could withstand the unpredictable weather conditions during the wilderness expedition.
Despite the strong winds, the tree remained steadfast, firmly rooted in the ground.
The ponderous sofa wouldn't fit through the narrow hallway.
Despite facing criticism, she remained unfaltering in her pursuit of her dreams.
Despite the storm's fury, his unwavering resolve kept him moving forward.
The silk thread is highly tensile, allowing it to stretch without snapping.
The superhero's indestructible shield deflected all attacks.
